RULING - A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant Aspen American Insurance Company's motion to strike portions of the complaint filed by plaintiff Mint Development, LP is denied in its entirety. Mint Development adequately alleges a claim for breach of the implied covenant and a request for punitive damages and all allegations sought to be stricken are pertinent to that claim and request.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
